svg.title: 2026-04-18 RSO Daily Roll-Forward
svg.desc: A dark infographic explaining how the 2026-04-18 RSO archive is produced from the previous day plus a bounded gp_history delta, with current GP audit data shown outside the consensus path.
svg.text: How the 2026-04-18 archive becomes a reproducible midnight state
Consensus path uses yesterday's archive plus a bounded gp_history window. The later current-GP pull is audit evidence, not an input.
Carried forward intact from the prior day.
Later GP changes are visible here.
They do not alter the hash.
AFTER-CUTOFF OBJECTS WAIT OUTSIDE THE HASH
28 NORAD IDs were present in current GP at audit time but not in the midnight archive.
They become candidates for the next bounded daily window.
Every operator should get the same midnight catalog hash from the same prior hash and the same 24-hour source window. Later observations are visible, but cannot move the hash.
Release bundle hash target: catalog 7d39feabed709e03...4535d804 | generated from manifest, delta, audit, and catalog files
